name: runtime_coverage_record
briefDescription: Record that a static entity was exercised .

name: runtime_coverage_coverage_report
briefDescription: Coverage report for the given entity kind .

name: runtime_coverage_variant_coverage
briefDescription: Variant coverage for a specific concept .

name: runtime_coverage_widget_state_coverage
briefDescription: FSM state and transition coverage for a widget .

name: runtime_coverage_widget_lifecycle_report
briefDescription:
Full widget lifecycle report : mount unmount counts , 
 active instances , re...

name: runtime_coverage_widget_render_trace
briefDescription:
Per instance render trace : every render with timestamp , 
 duration , trigge...

name: runtime_coverage_widget_comparison
briefDescription: Rank all widgets by render performance .

name: runtime_coverage_dead_at_runtime
briefDescription:
Return all static entities of the given kind that 
 have never been exercised...
